name: beomsu-koh
description: Custom Claude Code plugins: thinking tools, Obsidian vault management, and developer workflows

plugins.name: common
plugins.description: General-purpose tools: Barbell Strategy (antifragile), 5 Whys root-cause analysis, First Principles thinking, structured plan interviews, and anti-bot web scraping

plugins.name: development
plugins.description: Developer workflow utilities: GitHub issue creation, technical documentation, and project logging

plugins.name: obsidian
plugins.description: Obsidian vault management: YouTube transcript clipping, headless sync, mermaid diagrams, and terminology notes
